name: WritersProof for Moodle
tagline: Cryptographic authorship attestation for student submissions
description: WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of the writing process within Moodle. As students compose assignments, essays, and forum posts, behavioral evidence is cryptographically witnessed without capturing actual content. Instructors can verify that submitted work was authored by the student through independent evidence verification, complementing existing plagiarism detection tools.
features: Automatic session tracking for assignment submissions
Real-time keystroke behavioral entropy capture via editor hooks
Cryptographic checkpoints with VDF time proofs
Per-submission evidence export for instructor review
